caption:
We spent a morning with 30 finance leaders in Prague. Before the event, we called each of them and asked three questions about where they stand with data, AI, and what they need most.

The range was wider than we expected. Some were already building automations with Claude Code on their own. Others were still Excel-driven. Several were mid-ERP migration, questioning whether to migrate at all.

Thank you to everyone who joined. And to Jakub Žalio and Stepan Pittauer for speaking openly about what transformation actually involves.

👉 More on our blog. Ling in bio. 

#AI-readyFinance #Keboola

It is time for you to explore a new way of engineering — MCP (Model Context Protocol). 

Keboola MCP Server lets your AI assistant take real actions from chat — explore data, kick off flows, even draft SQL.

Build along with Joe Reis (step by step):
✅ Connect an assistant of choice to Keboola MCP
✅ List Shopify tables
✅ Explore data for quick insights
✅ Push a flow to BigQuery
✅ Generate a star schema — all from chat

We’ve prepared a follow-along blog to help you start today — how-to + copy-paste prompts in our link in bio.

Save this post and follow along. 🚀 

#JoeReiss #DataEngineering #DataOps #AI

Tariffs.
It feels like every time you get a handle on them… someone changes the ball mid-game.

And somehow, you're still expected to hit margin targets.

Steven invites you to a webinar that tackles tariffs - not from a policy perspective, but from a data point of view.

📦 Automatically refresh tariff data from government sources
🔄 Simulate what happens when rates jump from 30% to 240%
📊 See how it hits your margin - before it does

For better data visibility (and fewer spreadsheet nightmares).

🎟️ Register for free via the link in our bio.

What can you actually do with Keboola MCP Server?

Pretty much everything you'd click through manually - but now your AI agent can handle it for you:

✅ Build & update components
✅ Run SQL & Python transformations
✅ Create full end-to-end flows
✅ Handle errors or even read the docs for you
✅ Activate data across Snowflake, BigQuery & 700+ other tools

It’s full automation. And yes, the agents really do it. 🤖

#Keboola #MCPServer #AIinData #DataOps #Automation #NoCode #DataEngineering #PlatformTools

Need near real-time data sync that won’t kill your DB? 

In this on-demand session, Keboola’s Field CTO Vojta Tuma explains how our CDC replicates up to 1 million rows per minute, every 5 minutes, without killing your own DB.

✅ Captures inserts, updates & deletes
✅ Handles schema changes automatically
✅ Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB
✅ Built on Debezium + Dagster
✅ Comes with built-in deduplication, hashing & masking

🎥 Watch now - link in bio.

#ChangeDataCapture #CDC #DataEngineering #DataSync #EcommerceData #Keboola #DataPipelines #RealTimeData

Did you know?

The New Year’s Eve countdown is accompanied by the chimes of Big Ben, and a digital countdown timer is projected onto the London’s Eye centre.
This tradition was inaugurated in the year 2000 with over 107,000 attendees in 2015 - 2016.
Fireworks’ budget that year was £313,000.

Less than two months till it’s here again!
